sourcePrompt: A ZPU-4 quad anti-aircraft gun, an NVA towed mount about four and a half meters long. Four heavy machine-gun barrels with conical flash hiders sit clustered in a two-by-two block, elevated together skyward from a rotating central mount with a gunner's seat and two small shield plates, all riding a four-wheeled towing carriage with a hitch arm. Dark green steel, bristling and skyward.
handEdit: jacks deployed DOWN to ground pads (feet hovered at y=0.8, upside-down); turret slew 15->0deg square to carriage; shields reoriented thin-axis-X to face forward in a shallow V (were sideways wings); 35deg elevation kept
